hero.description: ReMatch verifies every player via the official Riot API — rank, WR, champions. Filter by role, language, region, and find the partner that fits your style.

header.title: Find your teammate
header.description: Use the 'Live Online' filter to find players who are active right now and ready to jump into a game. Filter by region, role, and rank to find your ideal teammate in minutes.

timeSaver.description: Activate the Live Online filter to see only those currently on the site. This allows you to find a duo instantly, instead of waiting for hours.

header.title: Match Center
header.description: All your confirmed partners in one place. View profiles and message directly — no need to switch to Discord.

requests.title: Incoming Requests
requests.description: When someone wants to play with you — you'll see it here and in your messages

header.title: Profile Editor
header.description: Set up your card for each game and start searching

header.title: Full Player Intel
header.description: Click any card to open the full player profile — verified rank, top champion mastery, playstyle bio, OP.GG link, and community reviews.

intel.bio: I don't just clear camps, I clear the path to victory. Looking for an aggressive mid-laner to invade together

cta.title: Ready to play together?
cta.description: Send a team request and start climbing.

empty.title: No reviews yet
empty.description: Be the first to review after playing

header.title: In-app Messaging
header.description: Don't need to hop onto Discord to get to know someone. Message confirmed matches directly through our platform.

connecting.title: 💬 Message after connecting
connecting.description: Once you both agree to play, a private chat opens automatically.

notifications.title: 🔔 Real-time notifications
notifications.description: Get notified instantly when someone wants to join your lobby.

organized.title: 🗂 Organized chats
organized.description: Keep your gaming conversations separate from your personal life.

header.title: Three steps to the climb
header.description: No manual registrations, no fake ranks. Pure data.

step1.title: Customize Profile
step1.description: Set up your profile for each game. Your rank and stats are automatically verified via Riot API.

step2.title: Discovery
step2.description: Filter players by role, queue type, and language. Browse real-time verified cards.

step3.title: Play & Climb
step3.description: Message confirmed matches directly on the site. Communication is the key to a 60%+ winrate.

cta.description: The gates are just opening. Join as a Founding Member, shape the future of this community, and find your duo before the first million arrives.

footer.disclaimer: ReMatch is not affiliated with Riot Games. All data is retrieved via the official Riot API.

noInfo.lol: Summoner is keeping a low profile.

Chat.title: Messages
Chat.emptyState: No active chats. Match with players to start talking!

editor.postCardDesc: Enable to show your {game} profile in discovery.
editor.placeholderName: Your social nickname for this app
